description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a neatly groomed appearance, wearing a buttoned-up collared shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted pants secured by a belt. He has a slim build and stands upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed at his sides. His footwear consists of sturdy, rounded-toe shoes suitable for walking in urban environments. The figure features a short, well-kept hairstyle and wears glasses, adding to a professional or casual business look. The facial features are defined, with a trimmed beard and mustache, and the overall attire suggests a modern, urban setting. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a tidy and composed demeanor.
description: A standing adult male with glasses, short hair, a collared shirt, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes, presenting a neat, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, glasses, facial hair, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, belt, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and shoe outline.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted pants with a belt
